svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="OpenLuban 生态全景" id="eco1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-744" dy="-249" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="访客 / 运营" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="640" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app_layer" parent="1" style="rounded=0;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;" value="应用服务（本机 dev 裸进程，端口互不冲突）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="1240" x="80" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="engine" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="engine :5173
Vue3 SPA
运营后台 + 设计器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="160" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="website" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="web :3000
Nuxt SSR
访客公开站点" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="1060" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="bff :3100
Next.js
聚合 / 鉴权 / 转码" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="570" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="backend :8080
Spring Boot
业务后端（唯一权威）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="820" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cap_layer" parent="1" style="rounded=0;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;" value="核心能力（被设计器与渲染端共用）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="1240" x="80" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="designer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="可视化设计器
/designer 全屏" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="120" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="renderer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="双渲染引擎
设计态 / 运行态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="320" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="schema" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Schema 体系
物料协议 + 版本治理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="520" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uilib" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="luban-ui 组件库
Vue3 + Storybook" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="730" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ai" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="AI 助手
图片 → 低代码页面" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="930" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="client" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="client
flutter 多端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="1130" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="infra_layer" parent="1" style="rounded=0;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;" value="中间件（远端 dev 服务器 192.168.100.248）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="640" x="380" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mysql" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="MySQL :13306
db=luban" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="480" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="redis" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Redis :16379
缓存 / 会话" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="780" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deprecated" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;dashed=1;" value="backend-go（Go 后端）
已废弃 DEPRECATED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="1180" y="780" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="website" value="SSR"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="engine" value="运营操作"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="engine" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="bff" value="/api proxy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="website" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="bff"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="bff" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="backend"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="mysql"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="redis"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="designer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="uilib" value="设计态共用"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="renderer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="schema"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="uilib" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="schema"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));
